message:
docs: Add missing rustdoc for ftui-core, ftui-text, ftui-layout

Complete doc coverage for three crates:
- ftui-core: animation (Slide, Sequence, Parallel, Delayed), geometry (Sides)
- ftui-text: view (Viewport fields)
- ftui-layout: Alignment variants, Measurement fields and constructors

All three crates now pass `RUSTDOCFLAGS="-D missing_docs" cargo doc`.

Part of bd-2a5 (API documentation and examples suite)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
